claim: Active Greek Daniel DRB addition/source-address lanes are populated and exact-source-collated for Prayer/Song, Susanna plus DRB transition row, and Bel and the Dragon.

limitations: This does not verify NRSV addition text because NRSV additions remain blocked pending approved source witness acquisition.
This does not claim full Greek Daniel trust across every translation lane.
This does not resolve Greek Esther.
